revision_priority: Add `Bedrock` to `## Skills` so every TikTok technology mention has a Skills citation.
Rewrite `## Professional Summary` as three complete labeled sentences to match the stated format with minimal wording changes.
revision_instructions: Make two surgical edits only. First, in `## Skills`, append `Bedrock` to the `Cloud` line so the TikTok RAG bullet has a matching Skills citation; do not remove or soften the existing TikTok evidence. Second, in `## Professional Summary`, keep the same three content ideas but render them as three complete labeled sentences with `**Label:**` prefixes and periods instead of bullet fragments; preserve the PHP/MySQL/JavaScript/HTML/CSS/Agile/Git wording and, if possible, use a higher-signal third label such as `Systems Judgment:`.
